## Release Hygiene Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm pack --dry-run --json` (or equivalent) and reviewed included files
- [ ] I ran `node scripts/audit-package.mjs`
- [ ] If packaging behavior changed, I updated `data/pack-manifest.json`
- [ ] I confirmed no secrets/proprietary code were added
- [ ] I updated docs/checklists if policy or workflow changed
